posts.author: StepNetwork (Sean Chrone)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Being able to choose the default email sender in a a new email, based on each users priority.

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to streamline work, while diminishing failures. Sometimes people send from the wrong email.
